title: Baal Veer
desc: Baalveer and the fairies help the children get their memories back. Meanwhile, Sarangee formulates her new plan against Baalveer.

desc: Due to Sarangee Pari's magical colour, the kids lose their memory. Later, Baalveer finds her, but before he can harm her, she runs away.
